Records.description: Broadhurst wheel family, wheel_L8_massless. Broadhurst wheel W(n): an n-cycle of spokes meeting a central hub. Vacuum graph, n loops. W(3) = K4 = zigzag Z_3. phi^4 primitive period of the wheels-with-spokes family. Value = 3432*Zeta[13].

Results.normalization: phi^4 projective period at D=4 (Broadhurst-Schnetz convention); normFactor=1; same vacuum-period path as zigzag, NOT comparable to dim-reg momentum-space vacuum integrals
